evidence.purpose: Reusable skillos coordinator command for skill-discoveries promotion ladder
checks: reads skill-discoveries JSONL over a 24h window
gates apply mode on idempotency key

evidence.purpose: Fixture coverage for all acceptance gates
Skill discovery emitted for this coordinator pattern

joshua_lens_depth_check.operator_grade_durability: The coordinator keeps live dispatch and Agent Mail mutation out of the first implementation, so an operations team can observe the ladder before trusting it with automated work assignment.
joshua_lens_depth_check.team_fit: The dry-run/apply/idempotency split is first-90-days senior ops hire shippable: readable output, reversible posture, and a fixture harness for the operational thresholds.
joshua_lens_depth_check.company_building_leverage: The pulse row turns isolated worker discoveries into a durable HQ signal that can compound across sessions and still be understood after the original author leaves.
